name: JOINT Corp
summary: PARTI " Our mission is to improve quality of life through routine and affordable chiropractic care." Overview We are a growing franchisor and operator of chiropractic clinics that uses a private pay, non-insurance, cash-based model. We seek to be the leading provider of chiropractic care in the markets we serve and to become the most recognized brand in our industry.
